actors.text: H0: p=0.30 vs Ha: p>0.30. p-value=0.041, alpha=0.05. Pick the correct conclusion.
Reject H0; there is convincing evidence that more than 30% of voters favor the measure
Accept Ha; we have proven p > 0.30
actors.reflection: Significance tests never PROVE a hypothesis -- they reject or fail to reject. We say there's evidence FOR Ha, not that it's proven.

actors.text: Fail to reject H0; p > alpha so the data support H0
actors.reflection: 0.041 < 0.05, so we DO reject H0. Also, failing to reject H0 never gives evidence FOR H0 -- only insufficient evidence for Ha.

completion.rule: any correct QuestionDoor switch pressed by >= 1/3 of online players, then any Player walks onto Goal
